name: Bhedaghat Marble Rocks
description: A stunning 3 km long gorge on the Narmada River where white marble cliffs rise 100 feet from the water, creating a magical sight, especially under moonlight.
history: The marble cliffs have been a popular natural attraction for centuries. The nearby Chausath Yogini temple dates back to the 10th century.
famousFor: Marble rocks, Dhuandhar Falls, and boat rides.
